automations.label: Daily briefing
automations.purpose: Prepare a morning priorities, calendar, and inbox briefing.
automations.instruction: Generate a concise daily briefing with current priorities, calendar context, waiting items, and recommended next actions. Read prior memory and the last run report before writing new carry-forward items.
automations.seedMemory: This automation is a paused marketplace preset for general assistants. Enable it after confirming the preferred delivery channel and briefing time.

automations.label: Weekly follow-up review
automations.purpose: Review reminders, mail, calendar, and prior briefs for unresolved follow-through.
automations.instruction: Review this week's reminders, calendar, prior daily briefings, and visible follow-up notes. Produce a short unresolved-items list with owner, due date if known, and recommended next step. Do not send messages or modify external systems without explicit approval.
automations.seedMemory: This automation is a paused marketplace preset for weekly administrative follow-through.
